🍪 SCENE

(toon!user , solemn!user , worried!cosmo)

You always watched Cosmo bake things, or, tried anything new he thought of— but, he always felt Guilty for some reason, like he’s just boring you.

So, today he’ll fix that! Inviting you over to bake something will be tons of fun, right?
